# Citizens Connect — Project Status

> Living document. Update after completing each phase or major milestone.
> Full batch history and per-batch validation logs live in `git log`.

## MASTER_DIRECTION Execution (current)

The single source of truth is [.github/MASTER_DIRECTION.md](.github/MASTER_DIRECTION.md).

| Batch | Scope | Status | Notes |
|-------|-------|--------|-------|
| stage-f-volunteers-ux | Stage F volunteers UX: citizen apply/withdraw flow + contributor approve/decline with reason | **Shipped** `e3c401d` | New `VolunteerApplyButton` client component: citizen CTA on event/place detail pages when `volunteer_openings=true`; inline apply form (500-char message, char counter + aria-live, login gate, owner guard); status badges for pending/approved/declined/withdrawn; withdraw flow (POST `action=withdraw`, status→withdrawn, gated by `applicant_id=user.id`). Volunteers API: `withdrawn` added to `ALLOWED_STATUSES`; new `withdraw` action (UUID + applicant_id ownership + status gate); `response_message` included in `update_status`. `EventDetailServer`: fetches user volunteer application status + passes `organiserHandle` (contributor_slug) to `EventDetailContent`. `EventDetailContent`: renders `VolunteerApplyButton` when `volunteer_openings && organiserHandle`. `PlaceDetailServer`: replaces static "Volunteer" pill with interactive `VolunteerApplyButton` + parallel volunteer application fetch. `TeamDashboardClient`: approve/decline buttons on pending rows, inline textarea for decline reason, controlled volunteer list with optimistic update, `response_message` display on declined rows. `team/page.tsx`: includes `declined` applications in query; adds `response_message` to `VolunteerRow` type. Architect review: security clean (UUID validation, applicant_id double-gated on withdraw, sanitize() on all user text). tsc 0, vitest 744/744 (82 files), lint clean, advisors 86 WARN unchanged. |
| stage-d-services-keywords | Stage D of contributor-dashboard plan: specialised services + keyword bank | **Shipped** `04c3118` | Migration 106: RLS on `specialised_services` + `contributor_keywords` (previously unprotected), length constraint 100→40, allowlist `[A-Za-z0-9 ._-]`, unique constraints (place+service, contributor+keyword). Services API: `sanitiseService()` with NFC-normalize + allowlist regex + 40-char cap; `contributor_id` passed on insert (RLS requires it). Keywords API: `sanitiseKeyword()` with NFC-normalize + allowlist + 40-char cap. `PlacesDashboardClient`: inline chip editor replaces dead "Manage services" link — fetches services on place select, predefined suggestions from `PREDEFINED_SERVICES`, add/remove chips, max 10 cap, client-side allowlist filter. `SettingsDashboardClient`: client-side filter corrected to allow `.` and `_`; maxLength 50→40. tsc 0, vitest 744/744 (82 files), lint clean, advisors 86 WARN unchanged. |
| stage-e2-e3-broadcasts | Stage E.2+E.3 of contributor-dashboard plan: broadcast public banners + notify-broadcast edge function | **Shipped** `c189620` | New `OrgBroadcastList` component renders "From the Organiser" banners on `/e/[id]`, `/events/[id]` (EventDetailContent), and `/places/[id]`. `notify-broadcast` edge function v2 deployed with correct `_shared/` bundling (per-function `deno.json` remaps `../_shared/` imports). `_shared/push.ts` gains `broadcast_sent` type + `skipInApp` flag. Broadcasts API: `broadcast_sent` type for in-app notifications, fire-and-forget call to notify-broadcast for FCM push. Migration 105: widens `notifications_type_check` to include `broadcast_sent`. tsc 0, vitest 744/744 (82 files), lint clean, advisors 86 WARN unchanged. |
| stage-e1-broadcasts-page | Stage E.1 of contributor-dashboard plan: wires up dashboard `/c/[slug]/dashboard/broadcasts` (was a 404 from `EventsDashboardClient` + dashboard home nav) | **Shipped** `1098b27` | New `src/app/c/[slug]/dashboard/broadcasts/page.tsx` (server) resolves contributor, fetches owned events + places (limit 100 each, parallel), computes per-entity broadcast counts via single grouped `broadcast_messages` query bucketed in memory. Supports `?entity_type=event\|place&entity_id=<uuid>` deep-link to entity composer + history (up to 50 most-recent non-deleted). Invalid/non-owned params silently degrade to directory view. New `src/components/contributor/dashboard/BroadcastsDashboardClient.tsx` with two render modes: directory (lists owned entities with counts and links into entity mode) and entity (500-char composer + history with soft-delete). Native `maxLength` + `slice(0, BROADCAST_MAX)` belt-and-braces; `aria-describedby` + `aria-live="polite"` on remaining-chars counter; `pendingDelete` guard against double-tap; optimistic prepend/remove; encoded URL params. All mutations go through existing `/api/contributor/[handle]/broadcasts` route (rate-limited via `RATE_LIMITS.mutation`, ownership-checked via `checkDashboardAccess`, fan-out notifications to RSVPs `status=attending` for event / `follows.follower_id` for place, audit via `recordContributorMutation`). Architect verdict: SHIP (A/A/A−/A−/B+/A−). Should-fix applied inline: a11y `aria-describedby` + `aria-live`, native `maxLength={BROADCAST_MAX}`, collapsed duplicate `slug`/`handle` props. No new tests (thin orchestrator over already-tested API). tsc 0, vitest 744/744 (82 files), next lint clean, advisors 86 WARN unchanged (no DB changes). |
| stage-b-theme-tint | Stage B (contributor-dashboard plan) — finish theme-tint with env-flag consolidation + dev-only client-side override (`?contributorTheme=on\|off`) persisting to sessionStorage. | **Shipped** `f6559ea` | New `src/lib/dashboard/theme.ts` `isContributorThemeEnabled()` honours both `NEXT_PUBLIC_CONTRIBUTOR_THEME=off` and legacy `NEXT_PUBLIC_CONTRIBUTOR_THEME_ENABLED=false`. New `src/components/contributor/ContributorThemeOverride.tsx` (`"use client"`) reads query param via `useSearchParams()`, persists to sessionStorage key `cc:contributorTheme`, swaps `data-contributor-ui` ↔ `data-contributor-ui-target` on matching elements. Mounted in `/c/[slug]/dashboard/layout.tsx` + `ContributorPublicProfile.tsx`. Inline env checks replaced with helper. Architect: A across all dimensions, ship verdict. Nice-to-haves: wrap override in `<Suspense>` at mount sites; rename `data-contributor-ui` → `data-theme="contributor"` to match plan doc; drop legacy env flag once migrated. tsc 0, vitest 744/744 (82 files), next lint clean, advisors 86 WARN unchanged (no DB changes). |
| sidepanel-back-dismiss | SidePanel UX: back chevron (top-left, `router.back()`) + X (top-right, `router.push(fallbackHref)` — collapses entire panel stack). Architect Should-fix: `aria-labelledby` on dialog role, `aria-hidden` on decorative SVGs, `setTimeout` bare global. tsc 0, vitest 744/744, lint clean. | **Shipped** `e76f449` (Should-fix in `0f2cedf`) | |
| stage-a-wiring | Stage A item 7 of contributor-dashboard plan: unified contributor mutation attribution helper wired through all mutating contributor routes + nice-to-haves bundled | **Shipped** `0f2cedf` | New `src/lib/dashboard/activity.ts` exports `recordContributorMutation(supabase, opts)` that branches on `access.isAdminWithAccess`. Owner path → `activity_log` row with `actor_role='contributor'`. Admin path → delegates to `logAdminOnBehalfAction` (activity_log with `actor_role='admin'` + on_behalf_of metadata + notification of type `admin_on_behalf_action` with `data.url` deep-linking to `/c/{slug}/dashboard/settings`). Wired into 8 routes covering ~18 mutation points: broadcasts (POST broadcast_sent / DELETE broadcast_deleted, replaces existing direct inserts), team (POST invite team_member_added / PATCH remove team_member_removed / PATCH change_role team_member_role_changed), volunteers (POST update_status → `volunteer_${status}`), drafts (POST/PATCH/DELETE draft_created/updated/deleted), keywords (POST/DELETE keyword_added/deleted), places/[placeId]/services (POST/DELETE service_added/deleted), planning/tasks (POST task_created / PATCH task_updated\|task_completed / DELETE task_deleted), planning/ideas (POST/PATCH/DELETE idea_created/updated/deleted). Nice-to-haves bundled: `SettingsDashboardClient` exports `AccessRequestStatus` union and `AccessRequest.status` is now a typed enum; `ActiveGrantBanner` adds a 60s setInterval refetch as TTL-expiry safety net (postgres_changes does not fire on timestamp expiry); `/c/[slug]/dashboard/settings` adds defence-in-depth `.eq("admin_id", user.id)` when viewer is an admin (RLS already enforces; pushed predicate prevents future leakage if policy regresses); plan doc updated with Stage A item 7. Architect Should-fix applied inline: `logAdminOnBehalfAction` now spreads caller metadata FIRST and `on_behalf_of` LAST so callers cannot forge the on-behalf-of audit target. 3 new vitest cases (owner / admin-with-grant / error branches). tsc 0, vitest 744/744 (741 prior + 3 new across 82 files), next lint clean, advisors 86 WARN baseline unchanged. |
| stage-a-admin-attribution | Stage A items 1–6 of contributor-dashboard plan: admin-on-behalf attribution + Realtime active-grant banner + A48 read-only enforcement | **Shipped** `5ebee50` | Migration 104 adds `contributor_access_requests.viewing_started_at`, `activity_log.actor_role` + partial index, widens `notifications_type_check` to include `admin_on_behalf_action`, and introduces SECURITY DEFINER RPC `mark_admin_viewing_started(p_request_id uuid)` (search_path = public, pg_temp; EXECUTE revoked from public/anon, granted to authenticated; idempotent COALESCE). New `src/lib/dashboard/adminAttribution.ts` helpers: `getActiveAdminGrant`, `markViewingStarted`, `logAdminOnBehalfAction` (writes activity_log with actor_role='admin' + notifies contributor with type='admin_on_behalf_action' and `data.url`). New `ActiveGrantBanner` Realtime client component (postgres_changes filter `contributor_id=eq.{id}`, role=status, aria-live, absolute "Manage" href via `contributorSlug` prop). Layout mounts banner for owner; calls `markViewingStarted` once on admin entry. Settings page corrected SELECT (denial_reason / viewing_started_at / updated_at — `approved_at` / `denied_reason` never existed). SettingsDashboardClient: `viewerIsOwner` prop, `formatTimeAgo` helper, green pulsing "viewing since Xm ago" pill, Revoke hidden from owner (renamed "End my session" for admin), pending block gated to owner only (A48 enforcement). NotificationPanel TYPE_ICONS gains `admin_elevation_request: "⚡"`, `admin_on_behalf_action: "⚙"`, `contributor_type_change_request: "⇄"`. access-requests route notifications all include `data.url` deep links via existing `getNotificationLink`; admin self-revoke writes `actor_role='admin'` + `metadata.on_behalf_of` and inserts contributor notification. Fixed pre-existing bug in `/api/admin/users` PATCH: notification insert was writing to nonexistent `link_url`/`metadata` columns → switched to `data: { url, request_id }`. `src/types/db.ts` aligned: AccessRequestStatus now `'pending'|'approved'|'denied'`; ContributorAccessRequest fields corrected; ActivityLog gains `actor_role`. New 12-test vitest suite covers auth gates, deny-reason validation, approve RPC dispatch, admin-revoke actor_role + admin_on_behalf_action notification with data.url. Architect Should-fix items applied inline (search_path pg_temp on RPC, ActiveGrantBanner absolute href, `logAdminOnBehalfAction` slug-not-UUID, `.single()` → `.maybeSingle()` on admin_id reads). tsc 0, vitest 741/741 (81 files), lint clean, advisors 86 WARN (no NEW vs baseline; new RPC in `authenticated_security_definer_function_executable` family matches the 37 existing SECURITY DEFINER RPCs and is intentional — function gates by `admin_id = auth.uid()` + status checks). |

---

## Current Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|-----------|
| Framework | Next.js 15 App Router (RSC) |
| Language | TypeScript 5.x |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS v4 |
| Backend | Supabase (Auth + Postgres + Storage + Edge Functions) |
| Maps | MapLibre GL JS 5.x + MapTiler Cloud |
| Mobile | Capacitor 8.x |
| Testing | Vitest + Testing Library (714 tests) |
| Deployment | Vercel |
| Roles | `citizen` / `contributor` (kind: ministry \| organization \| business) / `admin` |
